ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY MURDOCK, NATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT PAYPAL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-23-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NATHAN MURDOCK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAYPAL, INC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WITNESS SASHA HANSEN IS APPEARING (VIA UNAUTHOIRZED ZOOM). THE RETURN CERTIFIED PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT VALID. THE CORRECT AGENT FOR SERVICE WAS SERVED BUT THE DEFENDANT WAS NOT INDICATED ON THE GREEN CERTIFIED MAIL CARD. PLIANTIFF'S CLAIM NEEDS TO BE RESERVED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SIGNATURE FOUND. SERVED JAN-26-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAYPAL, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURDOCK, NATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT PAYPAL, INC.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-23-2023 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
